chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-201 of 2019 Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case 20-02-2024 Mr. Liaqat Ali Shar, Additional Advocate General.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the petitioner, no intimation received. Accordingly this petition is dismissed in non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
